========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 去什么地方: 系统 PHP 安装目录
做什么操作: 升级 PHP 到符合要求的版本
========== Environment Dependency Check: What to do: Upgrade PHP to the required version

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 如何验证: 运行 php -v 查看版本，再次运行 php bin/w env:check
========== Environment Dependency Check: How to verify: Run php -v to check version, then run php bin/w env:check again

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 1. 安装缺失的扩展（如 pecl install %{ext}）
========== Environment Dependency Check: 1. Install the missing extension (e.g. pecl install %{ext})

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 2. 在 php.ini 中添加 extension=%{ext}
如何验证: 运行 php -m 查看已加载扩展，再次运行 php bin/w env:check
========== Environment Dependency Check: How to verify: Run php -m to see loaded extensions, then run php bin/w env:check again

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 如何验证: 再次运行 php bin/w env:check
========== Environment Dependency Check: How to verify: Run php bin/w env:check again

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 提示: 您也可以尝试运行 php bin/w env:install 自动修复部分问题
========== Environment Dependency Check: Tip: You can also try running php bin/w env:install to auto-fix some issues

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 检测当前环境是否满足框架和模块的依赖需求
========== Environment Dependency Check: Check if current environment satisfies framework and module dependencies

========== 环境依赖检测 ==========: 检测当前环境是否满足框架和模块的依赖需求，包括 PHP 版本、扩展、函数、复杂依赖项等
========== Environment Dependency Check: Check if current environment satisfies framework and module dependencies, including PHP version, extensions, functions, and complex dependencies
